name: Harata Ngaatoro

abilities.name: Combat Finesse
abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (melee) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

abilities.name: Echoes of the Ocean
abilities.text: Once per turn. When a friendly Scheme marker is removed within 6", this model may drain a (soulstone) or remove a Voyage token. If it does so, it may make a Scheme marker within 6" of itself.

actions.name: Carved Taiaha
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Voyage token. If it does so, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

actions.name: Claimed by the Sea
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Scheme marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (X)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or gain a Staggered token and be dealt 2 damage. Then, remove the target.

triggers.name: Calm Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Voyage token.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

actions.name: Haka
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Prepare action. Then, apply one of the following effects:

triggers.name: Peruperu
triggers.text: Enemy models within 3" must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Ngeri
triggers.text: Another ally within 3" declares the Interact action.

extraction_notes: Haka action has three options (Pōwhiri, Peruperu, Ngeri) listed as trigger-like entries without suit icons. These appear to be choices for the action rather than true triggers, but are formatted similarly to triggers with bold names and colons.
